DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST AT OPORTUNE, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JUAN CARLOS LEZAMA FLORES. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEZAMA FLORES, JUAN CARLOS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,655.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT LEZAMA FLORES, JUAN CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO JUAN CARLOS LEZAMA FLORES ON 08/08/16 RETURNED BY USPS LABELED "RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
